about_me_text: I develop digital solutions with a strong focus on user experience, performance, and modern design. By combining technical implementation with creative thinking, I build intuitive and scalable applications that provide meaningful value.
about_me_location: Based in Germany, I work flexibly and am open to both remote and on-site collaboration. I value ownership, clear communication, and teams that work efficiently while maintaining a long-term perspective.
about_me_workflow: I am committed to continuous learning and professional growth, constantly enhancing my skills through emerging technologies and practical experience. Adaptability, personal development, and a dedication to improving my work are central to the way I approach every project.
about_me_purpose: I approach challenges strategically and develop well-designed, sustainable solutions with a clear focus on user experience and quality. By combining analytical thinking with creativity, I create efficient, modern, and impactful digital products.
skills: I create modern frontend solutions, intuitive user interfaces, and efficient AI-driven workflows, with a strong emphasis on performance, user experience, and sustainable value creation.
skills_box: I combine technical expertise, strategic thinking, and a high standard of quality to develop digital solutions that are functional, intuitive, and designed to deliver lasting value.
portfolio_title: A selection of modern projects showcasing a strong focus on design, user experience, performance, and clean development practices.
pokedex_description: An interactive Pokédex application with a clean user interface, dynamic content, smart filtering features, and responsive optimization for a seamless experience across all devices.
join_description: A collaborative task management platform featuring an intuitive user experience, flexible organization tools, and streamlined workflows to support effective teamwork.
pollo_loco_description: A small 2D frontend game inspired by the classic platformer genre.
contact_title1: Do you have a challenge to solve?
contact_description:
From concept to implementation — efficient solutions with a focus on quality.
I develop modern digital solutions with a strong emphasis on usability, performance, and long-term value.
contact_me: Looking for a developer? <span class='large-size'>Get in touch.

privacy_section2_title: Collection and Storage of Personal Data
privacy_section2_text1: When visiting this website, information is automatically transmitted by your browser to the server.
privacy_section2_text2: This data is used solely for the technical provision and security of the website.
privacy_section3_text1: If you contact me via the contact form, your information will be stored for the purpose of processing your request.
privacy_section3_text2: Processing is carried out in accordance with Art. 6 para. 1 lit. b GDPR.
privacy_section4_text: This website is hosted by IONOS. The hosting provider processes technical access data to provide the website.
privacy_section5_text: Personal data is stored only for as long as necessary to process the request or as required by legal retention obligations.
privacy_section6_text2: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection authority.
privacy_section7_text: If you have any questions regarding data protection, you can contact me at any time:
